name: DatePicker
licenseNote: DatePicker's range/pro variants (DateRangePicker, DateTimePicker range) are @mui/x-date-pickers-pro and require a valid @mui/x-license key at runtime, same caveat as DataGrid. The base single-value DatePicker/TimePicker are in the free @mui/x-date-pickers tier.
description: DatePicker helps operators choose a single date — a maintenance due date, a report start date, a trip window's start. It pairs a typeable, locale-aware text field with a calendar popup (desktop) or a modal calendar (mobile), auto-switching based on pointer capability. Replaces the old repo's 'Picker' component, which invented a single component with a `mode: 'date' | 'time' | 'dateRange'` prop — the real library instead ships separate components per shape: DatePicker (this file), TimePicker, DateTimePicker (all free-tier @mui/x-date-pickers), and DateRangePicker / a date-time range variant (Pro-tier @mui/x-date-pickers-pro — see licenseNote). Pick the component that matches the shape you need instead of a mode switch.
keyRule: Use DatePicker for a single date value. For a time, use TimePicker; for date+time together, use DateTimePicker; for a from–to span, use DateRangePicker (Pro-tier, licensed environments only). All of them must render under a <LocalizationProvider dateAdapter={...}> (fleet-web uses AdapterDayjs) — that provider is not part of any individual picker component.

variants.name: Desktop (auto)
variants.whenToUse: Default behaviour on pointer:fine devices — a typeable field plus a calendar popup anchored to it.

variants.name: Mobile (auto)
variants.whenToUse: Default behaviour on touch devices (per desktopModeMediaQuery) — tapping the field opens a full modal calendar instead of a popup.

variants.name: Field-only entry
variants.whenToUse: Power users who want to type a date without opening the calendar — DatePicker already supports direct typing in the field; disable the picker affordance entirely with the underlying DateField component instead if no popup should ever appear.

variants.name: Static / inline (StaticDatePicker)
variants.whenToUse: An always-open calendar embedded directly in a panel/dialog, with no text field — a separate sibling component, not a prop on DatePicker.

anatomy.name: Text field
anatomy.description: the typeable, locale-formatted date field — a MUI TextField under the hood, defaulting to size="small" via slotProps.textField (karoo-ui override).

anatomy.name: Calendar icon / adornment
anatomy.description: opens the popup/modal calendar; also keyboard-accessible.

anatomy.name: Calendar popup/modal
anatomy.description: month/year navigation header + day grid; desktop renders as a popper, mobile as a modal dialog.

anatomy.name: Action bar
anatomy.description: optional Cancel/Accept/Today/Clear buttons via slots.actionBar / slotProps.actionBar, off by default on desktop.

behaviors.name: Type or pick
behaviors.description: The field accepts typed input in the locale's date format (via the LocalizationProvider's adapter); the calendar offers visual selection. Both stay in sync — this is native MUI X behaviour, not something DatePicker needs to opt into.

behaviors.name: Constraints
behaviors.description: minDate/maxDate and disablePast/disableFuture/shouldDisableDate prevent invalid choices at the source (grey out + non-selectable in the calendar, and fail field validation if typed) rather than erroring after submit.

behaviors.name: Format
behaviors.description: `format` controls the display/parse pattern shown in the text field (locale-derived by default via LocalizationProvider); doesn't need to be set explicitly in most cases.

behaviors.name: Desktop/mobile auto-switch
behaviors.description: `desktopModeMediaQuery` (default '@media (pointer: fine)') decides whether the popup (desktop) or modal (mobile) rendering is used; force one or the other with DesktopDatePicker / MobileDatePicker directly if the auto behaviour isn't wanted.

states.treatment: Default text in the calendar grid.
Filled circle in semantic.color.brand.primary.main — use dark text or brand.primary.dark for any label on it; white on #F47735 fails AA (tokens.json's accessibility.knownIssues).
Standard TextField error state when the typed value fails validation (out of range, malformed, disabled date).

specs.value: 'small' (karoo-ui override via slotProps.textField; MUI's own unoverridden default is 'medium', matching this repo's TextField.tsx convention)

props.name: value
props.description: The selected date (controlled) — type depends on the LocalizationProvider's date adapter (fleet-web uses dayjs, so this is a Dayjs object or null).

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when the operator types or picks a new value; fires on every keystroke that produces a parseable date as well as on calendar selection.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial value for an uncontrolled picker.

props.name: label
props.description: Not a direct DatePicker prop — set the field's label via slotProps.textField.label (this wrapper already injects slotProps.textField.size, so merge your own textField slotProps alongside it).

props.name: minDate
props.description: Earliest selectable date; disables earlier dates in the calendar and fails validation if typed.

props.name: maxDate
props.description: Latest selectable date.

props.name: disablePast
props.description: Disables all dates before today.

props.name: disableFuture
props.description: Disables all dates after today.

props.name: shouldDisableDate
props.description: Per-date disable predicate for arbitrary blocked dates (e.g. blocking a future service date that's actually in the past for a given vehicle).

props.name: shouldDisableMonth
props.description: Per-month disable predicate.

props.name: shouldDisableYear
props.description: Per-year disable predicate.

props.name: format
props.description: Display/parse format string for the text field; defaults to a locale-appropriate format from the LocalizationProvider if omitted.

props.name: views
props.description: Which calendar views are navigable (e.g. omit 'day' for a month/year-only picker).

props.name: openTo
props.description: Which view the calendar opens to initially.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables both the field and the calendar trigger.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Shows the current value but prevents changes via either typing or the calendar.

props.name: closeOnSelect
props.default: true on desktop, false on mobile
props.description: Whether picking a day auto-closes the popup/modal.

props.name: desktopModeMediaQuery
props.description: Media query deciding the desktop (popup) vs. mobile (modal) rendering.

props.name: slots
props.description: Overridable component slots (textField, actionBar, calendarHeader, day, etc.).

props.name: slotProps
props.description: Props forwarded to each slot — this wrapper injects slotProps.textField.size='small' by default and merges any textField slotProps you pass in.

doThis: Allow typing and picking — both are native behaviour, don't suppress either.
Disable invalid dates (minDate/maxDate/shouldDisableDate) rather than erroring after submit.
Wrap the app (or the relevant subtree) in a single <LocalizationProvider> with the dayjs adapter — don't instantiate one per picker.
Reach for TimePicker/DateTimePicker/DateRangePicker for their respective shapes instead of trying to make DatePicker do double duty.
dontDoThis: Don't force calendar-only entry — the text field's typed input is part of the intended UX.
Don't use white text on the primary-orange selected-day fill (#F47735) — fails WCAG AA, use dark text or brand.primary.dark.
Don't reach for DateRangePicker/date-time-range without confirming a valid @mui/x-license key is configured — see licenseNote.
Don't invent a `mode` prop to switch shapes — use the dedicated sibling component instead.
accessibility: The field is labelled (via slotProps.textField.label) and announces the selected value as formatted text.
The calendar is keyboard navigable (arrow keys move days, PageUp/PageDown change months) with ARIA grid semantics, built in.
Selected and disabled days are conveyed via aria-selected/aria-disabled, not colour alone.

related.name: TimePicker
related.why: The real sibling component for time-of-day selection — free tier, same slotProps.textField pattern

related.name: DateTimePicker
related.why: The real sibling component when both date and time matter in one field — free tier

related.name: DateRangePicker
related.why: The real sibling component for from–to spans (report periods, trip history) — Pro-tier, see licenseNote

related.name: TextField
related.why: DatePicker composes a TextField internally via slotProps.textField for typed entry

related.name: DataGrid
related.why: Its date-column filter inputs are date pickers from the same @mui/x-date-pickers family
